text:
Silver Dog (シルバードッグ, Shiirubaa Doggu) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and so is required for a player to complete the game. 
__NOTOC__

Summary

Silver Dog シルバードッグ - This card allows the caster to summon forth a Silver Dog. This silver furred creature is quite rare and endangered. If you mix five grams of gold into its food every day, it will excrete one kilogram of solid silver feces. It is possible to obtain gold dust from the Gold Dust Girl.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.098 :: シルバードッグ 
絶滅寸前の珍獣。銀色の毛を有する。しかも糞が銀でできている。１日５gの金をドッグフードに混ぜて与えると、１kgの銀糞を出す。
|-
![Eng]
|No.098 :: Silver Dog 
A rare endangered animal. It has hair of silver, and it's poo is made of silver. If you give it dog food mixed with 5g of gold a day, it gives poo of 1Kg silver.
|}
